title: smilax polyandra
intro: Smilax polyandra, also known as the Chinese sarsaparilla or Chinese smilax, is a type of flowering vine native to China and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Smilax polyandra include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Smilax polyandra is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
